project.name: DevKey
project.description: Open-source Android keyboard combining power-user features with modern UX, AI prediction, and command-aware autocorrect

current_phase.name: Full Kotlin Migration — Plan Hardened, Ready for Implementation
current_phase.details: 9-phase migration plan (0-7d) hardened by 2-wave Opus adversarial review (42 issues addressed). Phase 0 migrates constants before deletions. Phase 1 includes KeyboardSwitcher shim. Phases 5/6 swapped. Phase 7 split into 4 sub-phases.

active_blockers: Whisper model files (whisper-tiny.en.tflite + filters_vocab_en.bin) need to be downloaded
Debug logging system (DevKeyPress/DevKeyMap) not producing output on emulator

metadata.session_notes: Session 22: 2-wave Opus adversarial review of Kotlin migration plan. 42 issues found (6 CRITICAL, 15 HIGH). Added Phase 0, KeyboardSwitcher shim, CoroutineScope strategy, swapped Phases 5/6, split Phase 7 into 4 sub-phases. Plan + design doc updated.
